title: Created: Origins
description: A small mod that allows you to craft the Orb of Origin using Create machinery!
body:
This mod adds a process to make the Orb of Origin from an eye of ender using Create machinery.

### Requires Create and Origins.
**JEI, REI, or EMI, are recommended.**

## How to craft the orb?
To craft the orb, you start by taking a **fan** and **soul fire** and using it to haunt an **Eye of Ender.**
Then you cut your unfinished orb open with a **mechanical saw.** _(There is a 10% chance your orb turns into nothing here. There is also a 10% chance that this creates an extra blaze powder. These chances are completely independent of eachother.)_
Next, you use a **deployer** to line the inside of the orb with a **brass sheet**.
Afterwards, use a **deployer** to carefully place a **precision mechanism** inside the orb.
Then use another **deployer** and any **slimeball** to glue the edges of the orb.
For step six, you'll never guess, but you need another **deployer,** use it to place a **sturdy sheet** on the glue.
Next, use **sand paper** to remove excess glue from the outside of the orb.
Finally, wash off excess dust from sanding using **either a spout or fan,** combined with the power of **water.**

If you don't want to read all of that, that's fair. So heres a much shorter version of the steps.

Fan, soul fire, Eye of Ender.

Mechanical saw. _(There is a 10% chance your orb turns into nothing here. There is also a 10% chance that this creates an extra blaze powder. These chances are completely independent of eachother.)_

Deployer, brass sheet.

Deployer, precision mechanism.

Deployer, slimeball.

Deployer, sturdy sheet.

Sand paper.

Either a spout or fan, water.

--Note; the slimeball in the recipe can be replaced with any item tagged as c:slime_balls. This is done to be consistent with the super glue recipe from Create, which also has this quality.
